headline: Will Earnings Optimism and EV AI Momentum Change ON Semiconductor's (ON) Narrative?
summary: In recent days, ON Semiconductor Corp. reported that analysts expect a meaningful uplift in upcoming quarterly earnings per share and revenue, even as the stock lagged a rising broader market. At the same time, Heartland Advisors highlighted ON Semiconductor’s strength in power management and image sensing for electric vehicles and AI datacenters, as well as its ongoing push toward higher-margin products and more efficient manufacturing. Next, we’ll explore how optimism around upcoming...
